projects.name: CSP Cost Optimization
projects.details_txt: An Analytic Hierarchy Process powered tool to optimize expenses of cloud service providers to maximize profitability without affecting brand loyalty of paying customers.

projects.name: Anchor-free Pedestrian Detection enhanced by FPN
projects.details_txt: A pedestrian detection system for autonomous vehicles was developed using advanced techniques like Residual Neural Networks, Anchor-free algorithms, and Feature Pyramid Networks, significantly enhancing accuracy across challenging conditions.

projects.name: Indian Language Identifier
projects.details_txt: An automatic speech recognition system was developed to identify Indian languages, utilizing Mel Frequency Cepstral Coefficients extracted from news clips with Python Speech Features library.

projects.name: Credit Card Fraud Detection
projects.details_txt: Developed a Credit Card Fraud Detection system that analyzes transaction data to identify spending anomalies and potential fraud, ensuring the anonymity of financial features.

projects.name: Chronic Kidney Disease Detection
projects.details_txt: Devised a data-driven model to enable early detection of Chronic Kidney Disease using clinical data such as sugar, albumin, and hemoglobin levels.

projects.name: HackerNews Mobile Reader
projects.details_txt: Developed a responsive Hacker News Mobile Reader app with React JS, featuring article fetching, social media sharing, and single sign-on via Google and Facebook.
